title: What is Asuka yelling in german in the adv dub while throwing the ship during her battle against the JSSDF
display_title: What is Asuka yelling in german in the adv dub while throwing the ship during her battle against the JSSDF
wikitext:
[]: What is Asuka yelling in german in the adv dub while throwing the ship during her battle against the JSSDF?             Quote Post by oopsitsnolan » Thu Jun 16, 2022 8:42 pm I cannot understand it and I want to know

[]: Re: What is Asuka yelling in german in the adv dub while throwing the ship during her battle against the JSSDF?             Quote Post by Blockio » Thu Jun 16, 2022 10:00 pm She's a native German speaker, so it makes sense that during a moment of high stress and excitement like that, she might revert to that for a battle cry

[]: Re: What is Asuka yelling in german in the adv dub while throwing the ship during her battle against the JSSDF?             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Fri Jun 17, 2022 12:05 am Yeah, but what she's saying? I'm curious now hahaha

[]: Re: What is Asuka yelling in german in the adv dub while throwing the ship during her battle against the JSSDF?             Quote Post by AWinters » Sat Jun 18, 2022 6:32 pm This excerpt from the thread "Dialogue help!" In the Chit Chat forum might help. Berserker wrote: EoE Try that!/ Trieben (loosely translates to carry on, considering the context on hand) Eat this, arschloch! It'd be kind of someone who has a good grasp on German, unlike me, to confirm the EoE ones out.
